examples: The method and skill for balancing a complex oxid - reduction reaction equation are discussed in this paper.
The ore is lead mine of partial oxidation, the lead ore consists chiefly of galena and cerusite. 39% of cerusite is the most oxid in lead ore.
The reaction equation in a complex oxid - reduction, according to the authors, can be balanced by combining oxidization algorithm with coefficient algebra, which gives more than one correct answer.
